headline: NVIDIA Falls 4% on Rotation Concerns: How Strong Profitability Could Save the Bull Case
summary: Shares of NVIDIA (NASDAQ:NVDA) are trading near $201 in mid-morning action on Thursday, down roughly 4% from Wednesday’s close of $209.25. The selling caps a stretch of intense rotation chatter, even after a 27% one-month rally heading into today. The move arrives as investors process a string of mega-cap artificial intelligence (AI) updates and revisit ... NVIDIA Falls 4% on Rotation Concerns: How Strong Profitability Could Save the Bull Case
